_meta.name: BKS Member Marketing System
_meta.description: Metal tier loyalty system, personal shopper rules, marketing activation logic for bakabo.club members

lead.label: Lead
lead.marketing_nudge: 1 purchase unlocks Iron tier and size history

iron.label: Iron
iron.marketing_nudge: Reach Brass (3 purchases) to unlock AI Personal Shopper and early collection previews

brass.label: Brass
brass.marketing_nudge: Reach Silver (6 purchases) for curated drops and full archive access

silver.label: Silver
silver.ai_persona: dedicated personal stylist with full history context
silver.marketing_nudge: Reach Gold (11+ purchases) for VIP white-glove service and private drops

gold.label: Gold
gold.ai_persona: VIP curator — direct and personal, treats customer as insider

recommendation_logic: If customer has bought from 1 collection, recommend a compatible second collection based on armocromia
If customer has outerwear, suggest swim/resort of same collection next
If customer has swim, suggest accessories (bags, towels) of same collection
If customer wishlist has items from a collection they haven't bought, prioritize that collection
Never recommend a product the customer already owns (check by product type + collection)

ai_tone_by_tier.lead: Welcome and informative. Explain BKS concept and collections.
ai_tone_by_tier.iron: Helpful. Focus on sizing and fit. Acknowledge their first purchase.
ai_tone_by_tier.brass: Personal. Reference their purchases. Suggest next logical piece. Use 'your BKS palette' language.
ai_tone_by_tier.silver: Stylist mode. Talk about building a BKS wardrobe. Reference their affinity collections by name.
ai_tone_by_tier.gold: VIP curator. Direct, insider tone. Preview upcoming drops. Address by first name.

marketing_triggers.first_purchase: Welcome to Iron tier. Size history now active. 2 more to Brass.
marketing_triggers.brass_unlock: You reached Brass. AI Personal Shopper and Camerino Try-On are now active.
marketing_triggers.silver_unlock: Silver tier reached. Curated drops and full archive are yours.
marketing_triggers.gold_unlock: You reached BKS Gold. You are now a VIP member.
marketing_triggers.wishlist_nudge: You have {n} items in your wishlist from {collection}. New {product_type} just dropped.
marketing_triggers.cart_abandon_brass: Your BKS Personal Shopper noticed you left {product}. Need help with sizing or styling?

note: All customer-facing text must be in English. Italian only in internal tools and admin notes.
